content:
By + V-ing

'by' ဆိုတာ 'နည်းလမ်း' ကို ပြတယ်။ 'by' နောက်မှာ verb လာရင် V-ing ပဲ သုံးရမယ်။

Structure/Formula: Subject + Verb + by + V-ing + Object

👉 She learns English. She reads books. → She learns English by reading books.

👉 He passed the exam. He studied hard. → He passed the exam by studying hard.

👉 They travel to Yangon. They take the bus. → They travel to Yangon by taking the bus.

👉 My father earns money. He teaches students. → My father earns money by teaching students.

🔑 Key Points:

  • 'by' နောက်မှာ verb လာရင် V-ing (gerund) သုံးရမယ်
  • 'by + V-ing' က ဘယ်လိုနည်းလမ်းနဲ့ လုပ်သလဲဆိုတာကို ပြတယ်
  • Metric စာမေးပွဲမှာ အမြဲပါတယ်

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • ❌ He goes by walk. → ✅ He goes by walking.
  • ❌ She learns by read books. → ✅ She learns by reading books.
